{{Quote|Yes, gentles, should you wish to prepare it with lean cooked gornt shank or sautéed nerf medallions, this particular dish will deliver. And if meat is too scarce or your own metabolism rejects flesh of any kind, it also stands alone as a vegetarian dish! Enjoy!|Gormaanda|<ref name="hnn" />}}
'''Glowblue Noodles and Chav''' was a [[Foodstuff/Legends|dish]] made by [[Chef/Legends|chef]] [[Gormaanda/Legends|Gormaanda]] just before the outbreak of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. The recipe was modular, meaning that one could adapt it to different preferences, [[Diet/Legends|diets]], and availability of ingredients, and the dish would still be flavorful. For example, one could add meat to it, such as sautéed [[Nerf/Legends|nerf]] medallions or lean cooked [[Gornt/Legends|gornt]] shank. The basic recipe created a vegetarian dish that was suitable for beings unable to consume meat.<ref name="hnn" />

{{Food-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Glowblue Noodles and Chav was featured in [[HoloNet News Vol. 531 50|''HoloNet News Vol. 531 #50'']], an in-universe issue of the [[HoloNet News/Legends|HoloNet News]],<ref name="hnn" /> written by [[Pablo Hidalgo]] and [[Paul Ens]], illustrated by [[Joe Corroney]],<ref name="Credits">{{HoloNetNewsWeb||credits.html|Credits}}</ref> and published on the [[HoloNet News (original website)|HoloNet News website]] on [[April 4]], [[2002]].<ref name="HNN50 date">{{JCFCite|url=posts/6308795|board=Literature|thread=The Official HoloNetNews Discussion Thread|user=Mavrick889|date=2002-04-04|time=3:16 PM|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20200305125429/https://boards.theforce.net/threads/the-official-holonetnews-discussion-thread.5990764/page-13}}</ref>
